caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "I DON'T NEED NO" and "SIT" visible on the front is speaking into a professional microphone. He is positioned in a room with a wall of framed photographs behind him and a white mannequin wearing a white shirt to his right. To the far right, clothing racks are visible in the background. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular black and white logo on the left and a red "BOLLY TOY" logo on the right. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, laughing and speaking, with his facial expressions shifting as he reacts to a conversation. The background and equipment remain static as the man continues to talk and smile.
